pages.text:
20 January 1995

Excellency,

I have the honour to advise you that Iceland has decided to become a member of the

Office internationale des épizooties.

The Goverment of Iceland has examined the provisos of the International Agreement and of the Internal Statutes of 25 January 1924 and agrees to participate in the working costs of the Office under the conditions stated, especially with regard to Article 3 of the

International Agreement and Article 11 of the Internal Statutes.

The 6th contribution category has been selected by my Government.

The official Delegate of Iceland to the OLE will be Dr. Brynjólfur Sandholt, Director of Veterinary Services.

Accept, Excellency, the assurances of my highest consideration.

ón Baldvin Hannibalsto

Y Minister for Foreign Affairs

His Excellency,

Mr. Alain Juppé

Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France 37, quai d'Orsay

F_75700 PARIS

Copy to: Director General, ODE
